name: Standard User In High Privileged Group
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Standard User In High Privileged Group
SIGMA Description: Detect standard users login that are part of high privileged groups such as the Administrator group

False positives:
- Standard domain users who are part of the administrator group. These users shouldn't have these right. But in the case where it's necessary. They should be filtered out using the "TargetUserName" field

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype IN(12, 191) AND ("Event ID"=300 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%s-1-5-21-%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%s-1-5-32-544%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%-500}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%-518}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%-519}%')) AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%-500%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%-518%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%-519%'))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Standard User In High Privileged Group on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype IN(12, 191) AND ("Event ID"=300 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%s-1-5-21-%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%s-1-5-32-544%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%-500}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%-518}%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%-519}%')) AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%-500%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%-518%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%-519%'))) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Standard User In High Privileged Group
